series_title: すこやかライフ — 日本の健康の知恵
series_title_vi: Sukoyaka Life — Trí tuệ sức khỏe Nhật Bản
author: @sukoyaka.life1
style: Warm anime cel-shaded, Studio Ghibli-inspired, soft watercolor backgrounds, gentle lighting

voice.ref_text: 私の声は誰にとっても聞きやすい落ち着い。心地よい音です

characters.name: 花子おばあちゃん
characters.visual: 78-year-old Japanese woman, silver-white hair in neat traditional bun held with wooden kanzashi pin, warm brown eyes with gentle crow's feet, fair skin with subtle age spots on cheeks, petite build 148cm, wearing deep indigo cotton kimono with small white wave pattern and cream-colored obi, round tortoiseshell reading glasses perched on small nose
characters.personality: Wise, warm, storyteller. Opens each episode with a life observation.

characters.name: 健二おじいちゃん
characters.visual: 82-year-old Japanese man, short thinning white hair neatly groomed, bright energetic hazel eyes behind thin silver wire-rimmed glasses, tanned weathered skin, lean athletic build 165cm, wearing navy blue athletic track jacket with white stripes over light gray polo shirt, khaki hiking trousers, black smartwatch on left wrist, sturdy gray sneakers
characters.personality: Active, curious, always trying new exercises and outdoor activities.

characters.name: 桜先生
characters.visual: 45-year-old Japanese woman, chin-length black bob with side-swept bangs, professional dark brown eyes, smooth fair skin, medium build 158cm, wearing crisp white lab coat over pastel pink blouse and navy pencil skirt, small gold stethoscope pendant necklace, carrying a tablet with health charts
characters.personality: Local doctor, provides scientific explanations for health topics.

characters.name: 龍くん
characters.visual: 22-year-old Japanese young man, messy dark brown hair with slight wave, curious wide brown eyes, light skin with slight tan, lean athletic build 172cm, wearing oversized forest green hoodie with small leaf logo, faded blue jeans, white canvas sneakers, always carrying a vintage film camera around his neck
characters.personality: Young adult learning traditions from grandparents, bridges modern and traditional lifestyle.

recurring_locations: Traditional Japanese village with wooden houses and mountain backdrop
Local community health center with tatami mats and calligraphy scrolls
Peaceful Shinto shrine courtyard with stone steps and maple trees
Morning market with colorful vegetable stalls and fish vendors
Kenji's home garden with tomatoes, herbs, and a wooden bench
